messages.content:
中译英：成都一拟上市公司IPO项目组实习生
•	负责底稿的整理、归档、录入工作
•	梳理会议纪要，协助项目组完成申报文书的框架讨论
•	参与招股说明书的撰写修改工作
•	参与该公司的一轮二轮问询反馈回复工作

Intern at the IPO Project Team of a company in Chengdu
• Responsible for organizing, filing, and entering draft materials
• Summarize meeting minutes and assist the project team in discussing the framework of the application documents
• Participate in writing and revising the prospectus
• Participate in drafting responses to the company's first and second round inquiry feedback

润色如下内容：Intern at the IPO Project Team of a company in Chengdu
• Responsible for organizing, filing, and entering draft materials
• Summarize meeting minutes and assist the project team in discussing the framework of the application documents
• Participate in writing and revising the prospectus
• Participate in drafting responses to the company’s first and second round inquiry feedback

Intern at Chengdu-based IPO Project Team for a potential listing company
• Responsible for organizing, filing, and inputting draft materials
• Summarize meeting minutes and assist the project team in discussing the structure of application documents
• Participate in writing and revising the prospectus
• Contribute to the drafting of responses addressing the company's initial and subsequent rounds of inquiry feedback

中译英：•	“罗格斯大学数理联盟”社团的核心成员，多次组织策划数理数据方向的专题活动；
•	每周不少于一次参与社团的数理数据科研讨论会；

• Core member of the Rutgers University Mathematical Sciences Alliance, responsible for organizing and planning special events related to mathematical data analysis multiple times 
• Participate in the mathematical data research discussion sessions of the club at least once a week

润色如下内容：• Core member of the Rutgers University Mathematical Sciences Alliance, responsible for organizing and planning special events related to mathematical data analysis multiple times
• Participate in the mathematical data research discussion sessions of the club at least once a week

• Core member of the Mathematical Sciences Alliance at Rutgers University, actively involved in organizing and planning various special events focusing on mathematical data analysis
• Regularly attend the club's weekly research discussion sessions on mathematical data analysis

中译英：•	完成谷歌数据分析师课程并通过“谷歌数据分析师”证书的认证；
•	参加 IBM Data Analyst Certificate 的学习，目前已通过 8/10 的课程认证；

• Successfully completed the Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate program and obtained the "Google Data Analytics Certificate" accreditation.
• Currently enrolled in the IBM Data Analyst Certificate program and have obtained certification for 8 out of 10 courses.

润色如下内容：• Successfully completed the Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate program and obtained the “Google Data Analytics Certificate” accreditation.
• Currently enrolled in the IBM Data Analyst Certificate program and have obtained certification for 8 out of 10 courses.

• Successfully completed the Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate program and received certification as a "Google Data Analytics Certificate" holder.
• Currently pursuing the IBM Data Analyst Certificate program and have already achieved certification for 8 out of 10 courses.
中译英: 刊物 出版社

中译英：2021.05-2021.08 教研助理
•	被选聘为学校“统计学-回归分析”课程的教学助理；
•	参加学校统计学教授 Han Xiao 的研究课题-“R 语言建立时间序列模型”；主要负责纳斯达克上市公司的“股票历史数据和未来预测”的数学建模；

2021.05-2021.08 Teaching and Research Assistant
• Appointed as a teaching assistant for the "Statistics - Regression Analysis" course at the school.
• Participated in a research project led by Professor Han Xiao on "Building Time Series Models Using R Language" in the field of statistics. Main responsibilities included mathematical modeling for "Stock Historical Data and Future Forecasting" of NASDAQ listed companies.

润色如下内容：2021.05-2021.08 Teaching and Research Assistant
• Appointed as a teaching assistant for the “Statistics - Regression Analysis” course at the school.
• Participated in a research project led by Professor Han Xiao on “Building Time Series Models Using R Language” in the field of statistics. Main responsibilities included mathematical modeling for “Stock Historical Data and Future Forecasting” of NASDAQ listed companies.

2021.05-2021.08 Teaching and Research Assistant
• Selected as a teaching assistant for the "Statistics - Regression Analysis" course at the school.
• Engaged in a research project led by Professor Han Xiao on "Building Time Series Models Using R Language" in the field of statistics. Main responsibilities involved mathematical modeling for "Stock Historical Data and Future Forecasting" of NASDAQ listed companies.
